message:
Reusable feed buffer: eliminate alloc/dealloc per stream chunk

Replace per-chunk alloc/dealloc with a persistent grow-only feed
buffer (same pattern as inputBufPtr and keyBufPtr). Also use
encodeInto for string chunks instead of encoder.encode, avoiding
a JS heap allocation per feed call.

Net savings per feed(): 2 WASM calls (alloc + dealloc) and 1 JS
allocation (encoder.encode) eliminated.
